claim_boundary: fixture-backed comparison; empirical comparison pipeline; not an empirical validation claim; not a formal proof substitute
limitations: Audit diagnoses preliminary model-to-observable alignment only; it is not an empirical validation layer.

rows.deferred_improvements: Additional holdout analysis is not meaningful with only two benchmark rows.
rows.diagnosis: Small-sample benchmark with strong residual fit, but unit/sign interpretation and baseline provenance remain the main risks.
rows.implemented_improvements: Explicit sign-convention metadata, bounded fit metadata, residual diagnostics, and report-level formula documentation.

rows.deferred_improvements: Full multi-galaxy catalog support and stronger astrophysical calibration remain future work.
rows.diagnosis: The main weakness is observable mapping and parameter regime selection, not raw data availability. Rotation-curve proxy quality depends strongly on radial binning and bounded parameter sweeps.
rows.implemented_improvements: Tangential-velocity extraction, bounded deterministic parameter sweep, simple baseline family, and morphology diagnostics.

rows.deferred_improvements: No GRMHD image reconstruction or instrument forward model is included.
rows.diagnosis: The limiting factor is summary-observable mapping and angular scaling rather than missing raw imaging products. Shared-scale fits remain coarse; per-source scaling is diagnostic only.
rows.implemented_improvements: Threshold-crossing proxy audit, weighted residuals, shared-scale vs per-source diagnostics, and residual plots.

rows.deferred_improvements: A richer waveform-adapter family would be needed for stronger proxy alignment.
rows.diagnosis: Observer-memory proxy alignment remains weak. The main issue is model sufficiency relative to waveform morphology, not dataset access.
rows.implemented_improvements: Residual-envelope diagnostics and clearer weak-fit documentation.
rows.limitations: Memory proxy uses waveform-style comparison data

rows.deferred_improvements: A stronger reduced-order TNE waveform family would be required to outperform the damped-sinusoid baseline consistently.
rows.diagnosis: Ringdown alignment is limited by proxy projection quality and short noisy segment selection. The baseline remains competitive or better under the same window.
rows.implemented_improvements: Window alignment, raw/normalized strain columns, bounded TNE projection search, holdout diagnostics, and residual-envelope outputs.
